definitions.text: Noble in behaviour or actions; principled, not petty; kind, magnanimous. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: Thank you for your generous words.

definitions.text: Willing to give and share unsparingly; showing a readiness to give more (especially money) than is expected or needed.
examples: She's been extremely generous with her winnings.
Add a generous helping of mayonnaise.
